subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! The Friend, from the direction of His Most Great Scene, summoneth thee unto God, the Lord of Power, Who hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل ان الخلیل من شطر منظره الاکبر یدعوک الی الله مالک القدر الذی اتی
subcodes.subjects: @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement
